purpose: Readiness gate for a future runtime task after explicit exact-file approval of Archer Attack v2. This record does not authorize runtime work now.
preconditionsAllRequired: Neutral Master exact approval remains valid and SHA locked
Idle exact package remains approved and byte-locked
Move exact package remains approved and byte-locked
Attack v1 remains rejected/superseded and is never promoted
Attack v2 exact package exists and has explicit user visual approval
Attack v2 exact frame hashes and package semantics are locked in an active approval record
projectileRelease mapping is locked to the approved actual visual release frame
no source drift across Neutral/Idle/Move/Attack v2
complete Archer motion handoff contains exact paths, hashes, FPS, loop, rootMotion, anchors, markers, runtimeFlipX, transition notes, review concerns, and rollback plan
runtimeExecutionRules: reuse the technical motion pipeline demonstrated by PR #56 as a read-only technical baseline
avoid framework rewrite unless a demonstrated blocker requires separately reviewed scope
integrate only exact approved Neutral/Idle/Move/Attack v2 package bytes and semantics
preserve approved FPS, loop, rootMotion, anchor, markers, and runtimeFlipX
map approved Attack v2 projectileRelease to projectile timing without altering approved art
validate Idle -> Attack -> Idle and Move -> Attack transitions
keep a reversible rollback path to the immediately prior approved runtime mapping

checkpoints.name: Asset Load + State Registration
checks: exact approved Idle/Move/Attack v2 packages load under correct hero.archer states
no stale rejected-v1 or legacy texture binding

checkpoints.name: Playback + Transition + Anchor Stability
checks: Attack v2 plays once at approved 12 FPS/non-loop semantics
no root drift, crop, scale pop, anchor jump, stale frame, or obvious transition pop

checkpoints.name: Marker + Projectile Timing + Regression
checks: Move footstep cues remain isolated to approved semantics
Attack v2 projectileRelease fires exactly once at the approved visual release point per playback
projectile timing consumes the approved marker without changing Attack v2 art
targeted Combat/gameplay regression remains functional at x4

rollback.rule: Runtime integration must be reversible without modifying any approved Neutral/Idle/Move/Attack v2 bytes.

authorizationRule: Set authorizedNow=true only in a later scoped record after explicit Attack v2 exact-file approval and every precondition passes.
